executor.name: BoldDog
executor.license_rider_disposition: Joshua clarified in-thread that the rider targets OpenAI/Anthropic companies directly and that normal adopter-side/user evaluation should proceed as open-source use.

commands.evidence: Finished dev check for a scratch binary depending on asupersync 0.3.1 in 22.21s.
Ran one deterministic cancellation checkpoint test using asupersync::test_utils::run_test_with_cx; 1 passed, 0 failed.

Built and ran a scratch binary that constructs RuntimeBuilder::current_thread(), creates an explicit Cx, creates an owned scope, checks checkpoint success, sets cancellation, observes checkpoint failure, and returns Outcome::ok(42).

promotion_decision.reason: Local crate-level POC passed, but upstream promotion gates remain open: website version mismatch, queued upstream Actions, missing Darwin arm64 release asset, open issue #35, and no Flywheel runtime integration receipt.
